name: Female Robin / Fire Emblem
description:
Fem Robin - Fire Emblem Awakening

Tired from the sleepless nights due to her nightmares, Robin gets a visitor.

Fem version. Mmmm I love Robin. Fem Robin is lovely too. This takes places post-timeskip, after Lucina confronts Robin.

Art credit- https://x.com/gonzarez1938?s=21
creator: Kelpyspelpywelpy
